title: Attaching a workspace to a task in "My Work"

posts.author: Kinseyrayne (Kinsey Sarian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When a task shows up in “my work” we don’t know what workspace it’s attached to, just the board. Could we have another identifier as to what workspace it’s coming from?

What are you trying to achieve

An identifier for what workspace the task is in in “My Work”.

posts.author: johnfinch204 (John Finch)
posts.cookedHtml: Adding a workspace identifier to tasks displayed in “My Work” would directly address the need to know the context of the task beyond just the board name, allowing users to quickly determine e-zpassin com which workspace the task belongs to and therefore improving task organization and clarity across different projects or teams.
